attributes.title: HEXA-RTSC: Room-Temperature Superconductor Architecture and 12 Derived Products (n=6 Framework)
attributes.description:
Theoretical architecture for room-temperature superconductivity (Tc=300K, 1 atm) based on the number-theoretic identity σ(n)·φ(n)=n·τ(n)=24 uniquely satisfied at n=6. This dataset contains:

1. **Core Architecture** (goal.md): 8-stage synthesis pipeline with 91 parameters (87% EXACT)
2. **12 Derived Product Designs**:
   - Lossless Power Grid (송전손실 0%)
   - Helium-Free MRI (촬영비 1/5)
   - RT Quantum Computer (144 logical qubits, desktop-size)
   - Superconducting CPU (1/1000 power consumption)
   - RT EV Motor (99.9% efficiency)
   - RT Maglev Transport (건설비 1/5)
   - RT-SMES Energy Storage (grid-scale)
   - Tabletop Fusion Reactor (1/6 ITER size)
   - Space Colonization Systems
   - AGI Hardware Architecture (HEXA-AGI)
   - UFO/Flying Saucer Propulsion
   - Immortality Medicine
3. **Verification Scripts**: 13 Python scripts confirming all 937/938 EXACT parameter matches

Total: 938 parameters, 937 EXACT n=6 matches, 13 verified products at Alien Index 🛸10.

osf_metadata.wiki_home:
# HEXA-RTSC Dataset

Room-temperature superconductor architecture derived from n=6 number-theoretic framework.

See goal.md for the core 8-stage pipeline.
Each product has a .md design document and a -verify.py validation script.

files_manifest.description: HEXA-AGI: SC-CPU + QC + 17 AI techniques convergence
